response.overview: ASEC before 1989, the arrival of Me Roger Ouégnin, the 1990 triumph, the acquisition of Sol Béni, the reorganization of the supporters, the defeat in Casablanca, the tragedy of Kumasi, the Bamba Yacouba affair, ASEC Mimosas vs. Orlando Pirates, the establishment of the MimoSifcom Academy, the 1998 Champions League, the 1999 Super Cup, the African Basketball Cup in 2000, the difficult years, the reconquest of the title, etc.  Everything is examined in detail, with exclusive images.
response.tagline: Shareholders, this film is your story.
response.title: L'ouvrier Spécialisé
